# Nicole Kus Personal Landing Page

This project is my personal landing page for BAIS:3300 Digital Product Management at the University of Iowa. I built it to create a professional online presence that highlights my background, skills, and projects for recruiters and hiring managers. The site is mainly focused on entry-level roles in finance, data analytics, consulting, and risk management.

## Features

- Hero section with my headshot, name, and professional summary
- About section with my academic background and career interests
- Skills section organized by technical tools and analytics/finance skills
- Projects section featuring three class and analytics projects
- Contact section with LinkedIn and email
- Responsive layout for desktop and mobile

## Tech Stack

| Technology | Purpose |
|---|---|
| HTML5 | Page structure |
| CSS3 | Styling and layout |
| JavaScript | Reserved for future enhancements |
| GitHub | Version control and repository hosting |
| Replit | AI-assisted development |
| Azure Static Web Apps | Deployment and hosting |
| Markdown | Project documentation |

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

You will need:
- Git
- A web browser
- A code editor such as VS Code or Replit

### Installation

1. Clone the repository:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/nicolekus/nwkus-landing-page.git

Open the folder:

cd nwkus-landing-page

Start a local server:

python3 -m http.server 8000

Open in your browser:

http://localhost:8000
Usage

Use the navigation bar to move between sections of the page. The site introduces my background, highlights my skills, and shows three featured projects. The contact section can be used to connect with me through LinkedIn or email.

Project Structure
nwkus-landing-page/
├── index.html
├── PRD.md
├── STANDARDS.md
├── README.md
├── WORKING_NOTES.md
├── css/
│   └── stylesheet.css
├── js/
│   └── scripts.js
└── images/
    └── headshot.jpg
Changelog
v1.0.0 — 2026-03-10

Built the first version of the landing page

Added Hero, About, Skills, Projects, and Contact sections

Added PRD and STANDARDS planning files

Deployed the site through Azure Static Web Apps

Known Issues / To-Do

 Improve spacing on smaller screens

 Add stronger hover effects and polish

 Keep refining project descriptions

 Add more project details in the future

Roadmap

Add links to project details or GitHub work

Improve styling and interaction states

Continue updating the page as I gain more experience

Contributing

This is a personal class project, so outside contributions are not expected. If someone wanted to suggest changes, they could fork the repo, make edits, and submit a pull request.

Fork the repository

Make your changes

Commit your updates

Open a pull request
